Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Leilari]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Leilari is an actress in the movie Starhammer VI.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Leilari is Starhammer's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari uses a gray flight suit as emergency clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari uses synth-flesh putty to hide her facial structure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari has explored uncharted planets in the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari uses a steel band on her left forearm as a backup console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari is the wife of Clockworker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Leilari was found in a hiding place by Varic using pathfinding spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Leilari is a person who can be found in the prison.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Leilari has Aethertech implants in her jaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Leilari was distracted by her console during the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Leilari is a personal connection of Starhammer.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
